node.html:
Projects

Semantic Segmentation of Eyes Regions

Developed a segmentation model for the Open Eye Dataset released by Facebook, under the guidance of Prof Gowri Srinivasa. Our CNN model achieved a better mIoU score than the baseline submission by the Facebook OpenEDS team. The paper has been submitted to CVPR 2020.

Work

I have previously worked at Reap Benefit and Paisool (INBE)

About

I am a student pursuing an undergraduate degree in PESIT Bangalore, majoring in Computer Science and Engineering.
